criteria.growth_sweet: EPS growth (trailing quarterly YoY) between 10 % and 40 % — fast but not frothy (Lynch sweet spot)
criteria.peg_ok: PEG ratio ≤ 1.5 — the primary gate; you're not paying up for growth
criteria.rev_confirms: Revenue growth ≥ 5 % — earnings growth backed by real sales
criteria.roe_strong: Return on equity ≥ 12 % — management generating returns above cost of capital
criteria.debt_ok: Debt/equity ≤ 1.0 (skipped for Financials where leverage is structural)
